level_signals: Extensive experience in product, engineering or related field
Background leading products from ideation to launch
End-to-end ownership through all stages from concept to execution
Trusted and strategic advisor to customers

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Extensive experience in product, engineering or related field, with background leading products from ideation to launch.
Ability to operate in high ambiguity and build new, 0–1 bets.
Passion for deeply understanding user needs and finding the right solutions from first principles.
Product is a team sport, and building great products means working closely with engineering, design, customers, leadership, and more to help bring ideas to life.
Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex problems, concepts and decisions to various stakeholders.
Comfort working in a fast-paced startup environment, able to adapt to changing priorities and handle ambiguity with grace.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience designing for AI-driven products or conversational interfaces.
Experience working on enterprise and/or developer products, including SDKs, APIs, and technical tooling.
Experience with Typescript, React, and other programming languages.

scope.surface: Agent Data Platform — enterprise AI agent platform enabling businesses to build AI agents representing their identity and brand
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer experience quality and agent performance
core_responsibilities: Bring enterprise-grade AI agents to market
Solve for multiple stakeholder needs (end users, CX managers, developers)
Discover new tools and processes for building AI agents
Partner with engineering, design, leadership for cohesive product experience
Become trusted strategic advisor to customers in partnership with sales and GTM teams
Lead product from concept to excellent execution end-to-end

compensation.equity_form: equity plans for eligible full-time employees

green_flags: High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong AI/tech pedigree
Clear product mission and multi-stakeholder scope
End-to-end ownership emphasized — genuine PM autonomy implied
Encourages applicants whose experience doesn't precisely match the JD
Equity participation offered for full-time employees
Strong benefits package including parental leave, fertility benefits, unlimited PTO
red_flags: Primarily in-person company in San Francisco — eliminates remote candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
Seniority level is vague — 'extensive experience' undefined without years
Role title references 'Agent Data Platform' but JD body does not describe this surface specifically, creating ambiguity about actual product scope

scope.business_model (inferred from product description and enterprise focus)
